_schema: PMS-R3 search profile descriptor retained as tinygrad route-shape data. BoltBeam owns candidate generation/evaluation; tinygrad uses this file only as local manifest context and for route-space audits.
generated_by: Route status + do_not_search synced from extra/qk/route_manifest.py; candidate generation lives in BoltBeam.
_route_families_note: lanemap/coop/graph_gemm_pipe/live_split_attention are promoted generated families. owned_reference is rollback/reference provenance only, not a live default or search target. lanemap_layout_reshuffle and coop_halfwarp_direct are refuted sub-variant tokens used only by do_not_search.

status_vocab.promoted: generated/search-selected route is the shipped default for this role (no open search)
status_vocab.shipped: historical/rollback route exists but is not a generated default; not searchable unless a manifest row explicitly reopens it
status_vocab.shipped_owned: legacy owned route retained as rollback/reference only; not a live default and not a search target
status_vocab.refuted: a candidate was built+measured and lost; do not re-search as built
status_vocab.deferred: blocked-but-OPEN: a capability gap (e.g. renderer lowering of v_dot2 / cross-lane) prevents building this now, but it is NOT refuted on merits -> reopen when the capability lands. The codegen north-star frontier lives in qk_route_manifest.DEFERRED_CAPABILITIES (distinct from refuted/failed).
status_vocab.open: no promoted/shipped route yet -> a searchable failed/open row
status_vocab.failed: a tracked candidate row failed its gate and the role still needs a route -> searchable

attention_tile.note: promoted generated live-split/KV_BOTH attention route; owned two-kernel route is removed from the default path and retained only as historical baseline provenance

attention_combine.note: promoted generated live-split/KV_BOTH attention route; owned two-kernel route is removed from the default path and retained only as historical baseline provenance

ffn_gate_up.pipe_exclude_reason: out_f==12288 is BLAS-saturated (~107% of BLAS on lds2); pipe regresses it ~17% -> kept on lds2

do_not_search.disposition: deprioritized: G3 (generic lanemap) matches owned; the refuted axis is the OFFLINE LAYOUT RESHUFFLE variant, not the promoted lanemap route
exhausted/low-leverage (combine overlaps in-graph; fused is codegen-walled)
